text: This is the VOA Special English Technology Report.
zh: 这是美国之音特别英语科技报道。

text: Samsung Electronics won a case in its battle with the American technology company Apple over property rights.
zh: 三星电子在与美国科技公司苹果的产权之争中赢得一案。

text: A court in Japan ruled in a case involving Samsung's Galaxy series of smartphones and tablet computers.
zh: 日本一家法院就一起涉及三星Galaxy系列智能手机和平板电脑的案件作出裁决。

text: A three -judge panel in Tokyo said the products did not violate an Apple patent for organizing music and video on several devices.
zh: 东京由三名法官组成的合议庭表示,这些产品并未侵犯苹果一项在多台设备上整理音乐和视频的专利。

text: The court also ordered Apple to pay all legal costs related to the case.
zh: 法院还判令苹果承担与此案相关的全部诉讼费用。

text: A patent is a property right given by a government.
zh: 专利是政府授予的一种产权。

text: it keeps others from making, using, or selling an invention without the permission of the patent owner.
zh: 它使他人未经专利权人许可,不得制造、使用或销售某项发明。

text: But the case in Japan is just one of many in the worldwide legal battle between Apple and Samsung.
zh: 但日本这起案件,只是苹果与三星全球法律大战中的众多案件之一。

text: In August, a jury in California found Samsung guilty of willfully violating several of Apple's patents.
zh: 八月,加州一个陪审团认定三星蓄意侵犯了苹果的多项专利。

text: The jury ordered the South Korean company to pay Apple more than $1 billion.
zh: 陪审团判令这家韩国公司向苹果赔偿超过10亿美元。

text: The patents include so -called utility patents for Apple's pinch -to -zoom and tap -to -zoom technology.
zh: 这些专利包括苹果『捏合缩放』和『点击缩放』技术的所谓实用专利。

text: They let users change the way things appear on the screen of their device.
zh: 它们让用户改变设备屏幕上事物的显示方式。

text: device.
zh: 设备。

text: Included are design patents on the look and shape of the iPhone.
zh: 其中还包括关于iPhone外观和造型的外观设计专利。

text: Madhavi Sunder is a law professor at the University of California, Davis.
zh: 马达维·孙德尔是加州大学戴维斯分校的法学教授。

text: She has also written a book called From Goods to a Good Life, Intellectual Property and Global Justice.
zh: 她还著有一本书《从商品到美好生活:知识产权与全球正义》。

text: She says issues involving design patents are complex.
zh: 她说,涉及外观设计专利的问题很复杂。

text: Madhavi Sunder says patents are meant to increase competition and support design and development.
zh: 马达维·孙德尔说,专利本意是促进竞争、支持设计与开发。

text: She sees a problem with Apple trying to say its designs are something only one company can have.
zh: 她认为,苹果试图声称自己的设计只能由一家公司拥有,这里存在问题。

text: She She adds, it raises the real question of whether or not we should be protecting designs with patents in the first place.
zh: 她补充说,这引出一个真正的问题:我们究竟是否应该一开始就用专利来保护设计。

text: Madhavi Sunder says Apple built its computer company using the same methods that it is now opposing.
zh: 马达维·孙德尔说,苹果当年正是用它如今所反对的那些方法建立起自己的电脑公司。

text: Apple appears to be saying that no one else can use its methods.
zh: 苹果似乎在说,别人都不能使用它的方法。

text: methods.
zh: 方法。

text: Madhavi Sunder says, this goes to the heart of what innovation is about.
zh: 马达维·孙德尔说,这触及了创新的核心。

text: Samsung said the California court's decision, in its words, should not be viewed as a win for Apple, but as a loss for American consumers.
zh: 三星说,加州法院的裁决,用它的话说,不应被看作苹果的胜利,而应被看作美国消费者的失败。

text: consumers.
zh: 消费者。

text: And the company told its employees that it would continue to fight until its arguments are accepted.
zh: 公司还告诉员工,它将继续抗争,直到自己的主张被接受。

text: But the dispute is far from over.
zh: 但这场纷争远未结束。

text: On the day of the California ruling, a court in South Korea ruled that Apple and Samsung had violated each other's patents.
zh: 就在加州裁决当天,韩国一家法院裁定苹果和三星相互侵犯了对方的专利。

text: For VOA Learning English, I'm Laurel Bowman.
zh: 美国之音学习英语,我是劳雷尔·鲍曼。
